name: Herb-Roasted New Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 lb small red potatoes (unpeeled or russets)
1/4 cup chopped fresh basil or 1 tsp dried basil
1 tbsp chopped fresh oregano or 1 tsp dried oregano
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Cut the potatoes into 6-8 wedges each.
3. In a large bowl, combine the basil, oregano, olive oil, salt, and pepper. Add the potatoes and toss to combine.
4. Place the potatoes on a nonstick baking sheet and sprinkle with parmesan cheese.
5. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until tender and golden brown.
